nodes.name: Mock Insert Run
nodes.notes: MOCK of POST /api/v1/workflow-runs. At go-live: HTTP POST returning {id} for run_id.

parameters.jsonOutput: { "data": { "days": [ { "date": "2025-06-01", "theme": "Understanding Root Canals", "objective": "education", "post_idea": "Explain what a root canal involves and why it saves the tooth" }, { "date": "2025-06-02", "theme": "Teeth Whitening Myths", "objective": "education", "post_idea": "Debunk common myths about teeth whitening" } ] } }

nodes.name: Get Calendar Days
nodes.notes: MOCK of GET /v1/content/calendars/:id. 2 days for the test. Replace with HTTP GET at go-live; cursor-paginate for full months.

nodes.name: Call WF-BRIEF
nodes.notes: Per day (not per platform). The brief is shared across all platforms for that day → cheaper + consistent voice.

nodes.name: Call WF-CAPTION
nodes.notes: Per slot (day × platform). Runs days × platforms times.

nodes.name: Call WF-ASSET
nodes.notes: Only when generate_images=true. Per slot. WARNING: cost scales with days × platforms (~$0.06 each).

nodes.name: Skip Image
nodes.notes: generate_images=false branch. At go-live this is where the media-library tag-match would attach an existing asset.

nodes.name: Mock Mark Succeeded
nodes.notes: MOCK of PATCH /api/v1/workflow-runs/{run_id} (status=succeeded). At go-live: HTTP PATCH.
